case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. REGINALD EDWIN SIMMS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMMS, REGINALD EDWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET, #307, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,306.50 RENT, $245.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,551.80, STAYED UNTIL JUN-22-2004, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, FOR DETAILS.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-26-2004 - CASE SETTLED PER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. JPT-DAVID P DAWSON; CLERK-PARAM NATT; NOT REPORTED.
